title: ophrys carmeli subsp. orientalis
intro: Ophrys carmeli subsp. orientalis, also known as the Oriental orchid or Oriental bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ophrys carmeli subsp. orientalis include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
